from source import quicksort


def test_quicksort_with_duplicates():
    input_list = [3, 1, 3, 2]
    result = quicksort(input_list)
    expected = [1, 2, 3, 3]
    assert result == expected, f"Expected {expected}, but got {result}"
    assert len(result) == len(input_list), f"Length changed from {len(input_list)} to {len(result)}"
